title: Debug a view that will not update
description: Trace a stale UI back to a mutation the compiler cannot see or a missing reactive declaration.
body: Steps: 1. Confirm the underlying value actually changed (log it at the mutation site). 2. Check whether the change was an in-place mutation (push/splice/obj.field=) rather than an assignment. 3. In legacy mode, convert to a reassignment; in runes mode, confirm the value is $state and the proxy is intact. 4. Verify the template reads the same variable that changed, not a stale destructured copy. 5. Re-test the render. Rollback point: before refactoring the state model. Validation: a component test asserts the DOM updates after the state change.
